solutionFiles.content:
bash .zoeskoul/setup.sh
cd resource-guide
git init -b main
git config --local user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner"
git config --local user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local"
git add README.md pages/contact.md pages/guide-draft.md notes/old-phone-tree.txt
git commit -m "Start neighborhood resource guide"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -eu
rm -rf -- "resource-guide"
mkdir -p -- "resource-guide/pages" "resource-guide/notes" "resource-guide/generated"
printf '%s\n' '# Neighborhood Resource Guide' '' 'Welcome to the neighborhood resource guide.' > "resource-guide/README.md"
printf '%s\n' '# Contact Information' '' 'Help Desk Hours: 9 AM - 4 PM, Monday to Friday' > "resource-guide/pages/contact.md"
printf '%s\n' '# Guide Draft' '' 'Use this page to find neighborhood help.' > "resource-guide/pages/guide-draft.md"
printf '%s\n' 'Legacy volunteer phone tree' > "resource-guide/notes/old-phone-tree.txt"

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo='resource-guide'
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "Git is not available in this workspace."
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Initialize a Git repository in resource-guide.'
actual_branch=$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || true)
[ "$actual_branch" = 'main' ] || fail 'Switch to the main branch.'
status_output=$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain --untracked-files=all)
[ -z "$status_output" ] || fail 'Commit, restore, or remove the remaining workspace changes so the working tree is clean.'
if git -C "$repo" rev-parse --verify HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  commit_count=$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD)
else
  commit_count=0
fi
[ "$commit_count" -eq 1 ] || fail 'The repository must contain exactly 1 commit(s).'
git -C "$repo" ls-files --error-unmatch -- 'README.md' >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Track README.md with Git.'
git -C "$repo" ls-files --error-unmatch -- 'pages/contact.md' >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Track pages/contact.md with Git.'
git -C "$repo" ls-files --error-unmatch -- 'pages/guide-draft.md' >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Track pages/guide-draft.md with Git.'
git -C "$repo" ls-files --error-unmatch -- 'notes/old-phone-tree.txt' >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Track notes/old-phone-tree.txt with Git.'
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --verify 'HEAD~0^{commit}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Create HEAD before checking its message.'
commit_subject=$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --skip=0 --pretty=%s)
printf '%s\n' "$commit_subject" | grep -Eq -- '^Start neighborhood resource guide$' || fail 'Commit HEAD must have the expected message.'

solutionFiles.content:
bash .zoeskoul/setup.sh
cd resource-guide
git init -b main
git config --local user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner"
git config --local user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local"
git add README.md pages/contact.md pages/guide-draft.md notes/old-phone-tree.txt
git commit -m "Start neighborhood resource guide"
bash .zoeskoul/setup.sh
cd resource-guide
printf '%s\n' '# Local Services' '' '- Community pantry' '- Senior transport' > pages/services.md
git add pages/services.md
git commit -m "Add local services page"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -eu
rm -rf -- "resource-guide"
mkdir -p -- "resource-guide/pages" "resource-guide/notes" "resource-guide/generated"
printf '%s\n' '# Neighborhood Resource Guide' '' 'Welcome to the neighborhood resource guide.' > "resource-guide/README.md"
printf '%s\n' '# Contact Information' '' 'Help Desk Hours: 9 AM - 4 PM, Monday to Friday' > "resource-guide/pages/contact.md"
printf '%s\n' '# Guide Draft' '' 'Use this page to find neighborhood help.' > "resource-guide/pages/guide-draft.md"
printf '%s\n' 'Legacy volunteer phone tree' > "resource-guide/notes/old-phone-tree.txt"
git -C "resource-guide" init -q -b main
git -C "resource-guide" config user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner"
git -C "resource-guide" config user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local"
git -C "resource-guide" add README.md pages/contact.md pages/guide-draft.md notes/old-phone-tree.txt
git -C "resource-guide" commit -q -m "Start neighborhood resource guide"

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo='resource-guide'
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "Git is not available in this workspace."
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Initialize a Git repository in resource-guide.'
actual_branch=$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || true)
[ "$actual_branch" = 'main' ] || fail 'Switch to the main branch.'
status_output=$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain --untracked-files=all)
[ -z "$status_output" ] || fail 'Commit, restore, or remove the remaining workspace changes so the working tree is clean.'
if git -C "$repo" rev-parse --verify HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  commit_count=$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD)
else
  commit_count=0
fi
[ "$commit_count" -eq 2 ] || fail 'The repository must contain exactly 2 commit(s).'
git -C "$repo" ls-files --error-unmatch -- 'pages/services.md' >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Track pages/services.md with Git.'
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --verify 'HEAD~0^{commit}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Create HEAD before checking its message.'
commit_subject=$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --skip=0 --pretty=%s)
printf '%s\n' "$commit_subject" | grep -Eq -- '^Add local services page$' || fail 'Commit HEAD must have the expected message.'
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --verify 'HEAD~1^{commit}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Create the commit at position 1 before checking its message.'
commit_subject=$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --skip=1 --pretty=%s)
printf '%s\n' "$commit_subject" | grep -Eq -- '^Start neighborhood resource guide$' || fail 'Commit at position 1 must have the expected message.'
tmp_dir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmp_dir"' EXIT HUP INT TERM
git -C "$repo" show 'HEAD:pages/services.md' > "$tmp_dir/head-file-0.actual" 2>/dev/null || fail 'Commit pages/services.md before checking the task.'
grep -Fq -- 'Community pantry' "$tmp_dir/head-file-0.actual" || fail 'pages/services.md at HEAD is missing required content.'

solutionFiles.content:
bash .zoeskoul/setup.sh
cd resource-guide
git init -b main
git config --local user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner"
git config --local user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local"
git add README.md pages/contact.md pages/guide-draft.md notes/old-phone-tree.txt

bash .zoeskoul/setup.sh

cd resource-guide
printf '%s\n' '# Contact Information' '' 'Help Desk Hours: 9 AM - 5 PM, Monday to Friday' > pages/contact.md

git commit -m "Update help desk hours"
bash .zoeskoul/setup.sh
cd resource-guide
printf '%s\n' 'generated/' > .gitignore
git add .gitignore
git check-ignore generated/preview.html

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -eu
rm -rf -- "resource-guide"
mkdir -p -- "resource-guide/pages" "resource-guide/notes" "resource-guide/generated"
printf '%s\n' '# Neighborhood Resource Guide' '' 'Welcome to the neighborhood resource guide.' > "resource-guide/README.md"
printf '%s\n' '# Contact Information' '' 'Help Desk Hours: 9 AM - 4 PM, Monday to Friday' > "resource-guide/pages/contact.md"
printf '%s\n' '# Guide Draft' '' 'Use this page to find neighborhood help.' > "resource-guide/pages/guide-draft.md"
printf '%s\n' 'Legacy volunteer phone tree' > "resource-guide/notes/old-phone-tree.txt"
git -C "resource-guide" init -q -b main
git -C "resource-guide" config user.name "ZoeSkoul Learner"
git -C "resource-guide" config user.email "learner@zoeskoul.local"
git -C "resource-guide" add README.md pages/contact.md pages/guide-draft.md notes/old-phone-tree.txt
git -C "resource-guide" commit -q -m "Start neighborhood resource guide"
printf '%s\n' '# Local Services' '' '- Community pantry' '- Senior transport' > "resource-guide/pages/services.md"
git -C "resource-guide" add pages/services.md
git -C "resource-guide" commit -q -m "Add local services page"
printf '%s\n' '# Contact Information' '' 'Help Desk Hours: 9 AM - 5 PM, Monday to Friday' > "resource-guide/pages/contact.md"
git -C "resource-guide" add pages/contact.md
git -C "resource-guide" commit -q -m "Update help desk hours"
printf '%s\n' '<html>generated preview</html>' > "resource-guide/generated/preview.html"

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
(
git -C resource-guide diff --cached --name-only | grep -Fxq -- .gitignore
)
(
set -eu
repo='resource-guide'
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "Git is not available in this workspace."
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Initialize a Git repository in resource-guide.'
actual_branch=$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || true)
[ "$actual_branch" = 'main' ] || fail 'Switch to the main branch.'
status_output=$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain --untracked-files=all)
[ -n "$status_output" ] || fail 'Make the requested repository change before checking the task.'
if git -C "$repo" rev-parse --verify HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  commit_count=$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD)
else
  commit_count=0
fi
[ "$commit_count" -eq 3 ] || fail 'The repository must contain exactly 3 commit(s).'
git -C "$repo" ls-files --error-unmatch -- '.gitignore' >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Track .gitignore with Git.'
git -C "$repo" check-ignore -q -- 'generated/preview.html' || fail 'Configure .gitignore so Git ignores generated/preview.html.'
if git -C "$repo" ls-files --error-unmatch -- 'generated/preview.html' >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  fail 'Do not track generated/preview.html.'
fi
)

(
git -C resource-guide diff --cached --name-status | grep -Eq "^R[0-9]*[[:space:]]+pages/guide-draft.md[[:space:]]+pages/getting-help.md$" && git -C resource-guide diff --cached --name-status | grep -Eq "^D[[:space:]]+notes/old-phone-tree.txt$"
)

repo='resource-guide'

if git -C "$repo" ls-files --error-unmatch -- 'notes/old-phone-tree.txt' >/dev/null 2>&1; then

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -eu

git -C "resource-guide" add pages/services.md
git -C "resource-guide" commit -q -m "Add local services page"

git -C "resource-guide" commit -q -m "Update help desk hours"

printf '%s\n' 'generated/' > "resource-guide/.gitignore"
git -C "resource-guide" add .gitignore
git -C "resource-guide" mv pages/guide-draft.md pages/getting-help.md
git -C "resource-guide" rm -q notes/old-phone-tree.txt

commit_subject=$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --skip=1 --pretty=%s)
printf '%s\n' "$commit_subject" | grep -Eq -- '^Update help desk hours$' || fail 'Commit at position 1 must have the expected message.'
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --verify 'HEAD~2^{commit}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Create the commit at position 2 before checking its message.'
commit_subject=$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --skip=2 --pretty=%s)
printf '%s\n' "$commit_subject" | grep -Eq -- '^Add local services page$' || fail 'Commit at position 2 must have the expected message.'
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --verify 'HEAD~3^{commit}' >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail 'Create the commit at position 3 before checking its message.'
commit_subject=$(git -C "$repo" log -1 --skip=3 --pretty=%s)
printf '%s\n' "$commit_subject" | grep -Eq -- '^Start neighborhood resource guide$' || fail 'Commit at position 3 must have the expected message.'
tmp_dir=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$tmp_dir"' EXIT HUP INT TERM
git -C "$repo" show 'HEAD:pages/contact.md' > "$tmp_dir/head-file-0.actual" 2>/dev/null || fail 'Commit pages/contact.md before checking the task.'
grep -Fq -- '9 AM - 5 PM' "$tmp_dir/head-file-0.actual" || fail 'pages/contact.md at HEAD is missing required content.'
git -C "$repo" show 'HEAD:pages/getting-help.md' > "$tmp_dir/head-file-1.actual" 2>/dev/null || fail 'Commit pages/getting-help.md before checking the task.'
grep -Fq -- 'neighborhood help' "$tmp_dir/head-file-1.actual" || fail 'pages/getting-help.md at HEAD is missing required content.'
git -C "$repo" show 'HEAD:pages/services.md' > "$tmp_dir/head-file-2.actual" 2>/dev/null || fail 'Commit pages/services.md before checking the task.'
grep -Fq -- 'Community pantry' "$tmp_dir/head-file-2.actual" || fail 'pages/services.md at HEAD is missing required content.'
git -C "$repo" show 'HEAD:.gitignore' > "$tmp_dir/head-file-3.actual" 2>/dev/null || fail 'Commit .gitignore before checking the task.'
printf '%s' 'generated/
' > "$tmp_dir/head-file-3.expected"
cmp -s "$tmp_dir/head-file-3.actual" "$tmp_dir/head-file-3.expected" || fail '.gitignore at HEAD does not match the required content.'
